name: AVKR HOMES

metaDescription: Discover AVKR HOMES developments on Costa Blanca South. Edificio Vento apartments in Torrevieja from €158,000 and Samar Villas in Las Filipinas.
heroHeadline: AVKR HOMES - New Builds in Torrevieja and Orihuela Costa
heroIntro:
AVKR HOMES delivers modern residential developments across the Costa Blanca South, with a focus on quality construction and thoughtful design. Their portfolio includes Edificio Vento, a boutique building of 10 exclusive apartments in central Torrevieja from €158,000, and the Samar Villas development in Las Filipinas, Orihuela Costa.

Whether you're seeking a walkable city-centre apartment or a family villa, AVKR HOMES' offerings provide genuine value and modern comfort across two of the region's most desirable locations.

aboutSection.title: About AVKR HOMES
aboutSection.content:
AVKR HOMES has established itself as a developer focused on creating residential communities that balance modern design with practical living solutions. Their developments are strategically located in areas with strong growth potential and established infrastructure, making them attractive to both owner-occupiers and investors.

The developer's approach emphasizes quality finishes, efficient layouts, and attention to detail in every property. AVKR HOMES understands the needs of contemporary homebuyers and delivers properties that reflect current market expectations for comfort, style, and long-term value.

specializationSection.title: Development Expertise
specializationSection.content:
AVKR HOMES develops across two distinct segments of the Costa Blanca South market. Edificio Vento in central Torrevieja offers boutique city-centre apartments from €158,000, including duplex penthouses with private rooftop pools from €412,000. The Samar Villas development in Las Filipinas delivers family-sized villas in an established residential setting.

This range demonstrates AVKR HOMES' versatility — from compact investment apartments to spacious family homes, each project is designed to maximise living space and incorporate modern amenities.

qualitySection.title: Quality & Specifications
qualitySection.content: AVKR HOMES maintains consistent quality standards across all properties. Each home is constructed with attention to detail, incorporating materials and finishes that withstand coastal living conditions. The developer employs proven construction methods and works with established suppliers to ensure durability and aesthetic quality. Properties feature contemporary specifications that meet current building codes and incorporate practical design elements for daily living.

reasons.title: Established Development
reasons.description: AVKR HOMES delivers properties in well-planned communities with proven appeal to buyers and renters alike.

reasons.title: Quality Construction
reasons.description: Modern building standards and quality finishes ensure your home maintains value and performance over time.

reasons.title: Strategic Location
reasons.description: Properties situated in Las Filipinas offer convenient access to amenities while maintaining residential character.

faqs.question: Where are AVKR HOMES properties located?
faqs.answer: AVKR HOMES properties are located in central Torrevieja (Edificio Vento) and Las Filipinas, Orihuela Costa (Samar Villas). Both areas are on the Costa Blanca South.

faqs.question: What type of properties does AVKR HOMES develop?
faqs.answer: AVKR HOMES builds city-centre apartments, duplex penthouses, and family villas. Their Edificio Vento project features 1–3 bed apartments from €158,000, while Samar Villas offers larger family homes.

faqs.question: How many AVKR HOMES properties are currently available?
faqs.answer: We currently showcase 6 AVKR HOMES properties — 4 at Edificio Vento in Torrevieja and 2 at Samar Villas in Las Filipinas. Contact us for current availability.

conclusion: AVKR HOMES offers genuine value across two distinct Costa Blanca South locations. Explore Edificio Vento for city-centre apartments in Torrevieja from €158,000, or Samar Villas for family homes in Las Filipinas. Connect with our team to arrange a viewing or discuss which development suits your needs.
